name: Lona RPG (early alpha)
description:
This bot is my attempt to recreate LonaRPG game in j.ai. So, in short, this is a world of this game with some quests, main characters and most of main locations. I tried to write it so it will be as cruel as in original game.

As always, please, leave reviews and if you don't mind share your chats.

Sincerely, your Dangor :)

Hello, my followers! I haven't posted anything for long time, so I decided to post one of my unfinished projects (it was made in April). If someone want to continue/remake this, I'd appreciate it.

My discord if you want to contact me: dangor_ .
creator: Dangor
